word: G4801 - συζεύγνυμι - syzeúgnymi - sood-zyoog'-noo-mee - Join together

sections.paragraph: இலக்கண சொல்வகை / Part(s) of speech: Verb / வினைச்சொல்
to fasten to one yoke, yoke together: to join together, unite
ஆங்கில மூலம் / Original in English: From G4862 and the base of G2201; to yoke together, that is, (figuratively) conjoin (in marriage): - join together.
